description:
Antagonistic quality review of `hx-visually-hidden` (T4-02) **after implementation completes**.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-visually-hidden/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, focusable prop typed (for skip links)
2. Accessibility — content is visually hidden but available to screen readers (not display:none or visibility:hidden), focusable variant becomes visible on focus (for skip links), axe-core pass. This component IS the accessibility primitive — it must be perfect.
3. Tests — content readable by simulated AT, focusable variant focus behavior, nested in various contexts, 80%+ coverage
4. Storybook — standard hide, focusable skip link demo
5. CSS — uses the correct visually-hidden technique (clip-path or clip rect), no clipping of focus outline when focusable, CSS parts
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB (should be near-zero JS)
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-visually-hidden/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-visually-hidden — T4-02 antagonistic quality review
